prompt: Kintsugi egg character avatar. White/cream egg with SMALL subtle calm dot eyes — grounded, not kawaii. A gentle subtle smile (soft curve, quiet confidence, not a grin). Moderate gold kintsugi veins that whisper, not shout — visible but not overwhelming. Small classy black bow tie (understated, not costume-y). Warm peachy/tan gradient background. Clean modern digital art. Elegant resilience. Sophisticated, calm, zen. Profile picture.
